formPrompt: Use clematis as the primary botanical form: star-shaped radial petals, visible linear rhythm, open but not flat geometry, and one petal subtly lower or rotated.
translationPrompt: Translate it into a translucent star-petal diffuser with brass vein ribs, asymmetric petal spacing, restrained thickness, and a warm central light core.
placementPrompt: Best for diffuser, shade face, wall sconce flower plate, chandelier module, or decorative light head.
